EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice Five
EmailTemplate.subject: 温馨提示：请填报您的返程航班信息以安排送机 Reminder: Please provide your return flight information for drop-off arrangements
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
提醒您于今日内登录展会系统（https://expo.hisense.com/home）提报回程航班信息。我们将安排24日的送机服务，请您及时提报，以免无法为您协调车辆资源。
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c},
Kindly remind you to log in to the Expo System (https://expo.hisense.com/home) to submit your return flight information today.
We will arrange airport drop-off on the 24th. Please provide your info promptly in case we cannot coordinate vehicle resources for you in time.
